name: fable-god-mode
description: Fable God Mode — token-discipline orchestration skills for Claude Code: Fable 5 plans and reviews, cheaper models execute, with an optional Codex independent-critic tier (default gpt-5.6-sol)

plugins.name: fable-god-mode
plugins.description: 10-80-10 token discipline for Fable 5 sessions: plan at full power, delegate the verbose middle 80% to cheaper Claude subagents, review at full power. Includes the report-only stale-config audit. Needs only a Claude subscription.

plugins.name: fable-super-god-mode
plugins.description: Adds a Codex reviewer (default gpt-5.6-sol, fallback gpt-5.5, via the OpenAI Codex CLI) as an independent deterministic critic: tri-state verdict bridge (approved/findings/codex_unavailable), probe mode, union rule, critique log. Requires fable-god-mode plus a paid ChatGPT plan with Codex CLI.
